title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 330.020 - Practice of podiatric medicine — license
text:
330.020.  Practice of podiatric medicine — license. — No one shall practice podiatric medicine in this state unless duly licensed as provided by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 9795, A.L. 1945 p. 965, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16, A.L. 2005 H.B. 402 merged with S.B. 178) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9074; 1919 § 5830
